settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
This action cannot be undone, and all your tasks and categories stored in Firestore will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteAccountSuccess: Your account has been successfully deleted.
settings.err_requires_recent_login: For security reasons, this operation requires recent authentication. Please log out, log back in, and try again.
settings.err_delete_account_failed: An error occurred during account deletion. Please try again later.
settings.font_preview_text: A B C D E F G abc 123

onboarding.desc1: is an aesthetic to-do app that helps you beautifully orchestrate your busy daily life. Organize your tasks at a glance with a post-it style memo board!
onboarding.subtitle2: Pin your own to-do board on the desktop
onboarding.desc2_2: icon on each category header. You can detach it as an independent small window, place it anywhere, and keep it always on top.
onboarding.desc3_2: alternates between focus and break times. You can also detach the timer into a separate popup window while working.
onboarding.subtitle4: Fonts and themes that fit your taste
onboarding.desc4_4: are available. Customize font types, sizes, and category colors freely in the settings window!
onboarding.subtitle5: Keep data safe and start easily
onboarding.desc5_1: All tasks written after logging in are saved in real-time to the
onboarding.desc5_2: securely. Also, enable 'Launch at system startup' in Settings to check your schedules immediately when you turn on your PC!

app.save_shortcut: Ctrl+Enter to save / Enter for new line
app.save_hint: Ctrl+Enter to save / Enter for new line
app.task_guide_memo_title: 📝 Try adding details & resizing the memo
app.task_guide_memo_desc: Drag the bottom-right corner of the memo area on any task card to freely resize the input field! Perfect for writing down long notes, daily journals, or detailed logs.
app.task_guide_due_desc: This task has an alert scheduled for 6:00 PM. When the time comes, a sound and system notification will trigger so you never miss an important deadline!
app.task_guide_link_desc: Any URL addresses in your memos are automatically converted into clickable links. Try clicking https://github.com to open it in a new window!
app.task_guide_repeat_title: 🔁 Set recurring schedules for weekly routines
app.task_guide_repeat_desc: This routine is scheduled for every Mon, Wed, and Fri. When you check it as complete, the record is saved, and a new task for the next scheduled day will be automatically created.
app.task_guide_popout_desc: Click the 'Pop-out' icon on the top-right of any category header! It detaches as a standalone window that you can keep 'Always on Top'. Pop-out windows are automatically restored when you reboot the app!
app.confirm_cleanup_msg:
Are you sure you want to delete
all completed tasks?
app.confirm_delete_task_msg_1: Are you sure you want to delete
app.confirm_delete_cat_msg_1:
Are you sure you want to delete
category
app.timer_focus_end_msg: Great job! Time to take a rest.
app.timer_break_end_msg: Alright, let's get back to focus!

auth.err_no_firebase: Firebase is not configured. Please check your .env file.
auth.err_missing_fields: Please enter both email and password.
auth.err_email_in_use: This email address is already in use.
auth.err_weak_pwd: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.err_pwd_invalid_requirement: Please satisfy the password requirements (At least 6 characters, must include both letters and numbers).
auth.err_operation_not_allowed: Email/Password login is not enabled. Please enable it in the Firebase Console.
auth.err_too_many_requests: Too many unsuccessful login attempts. Please try again later.
auth.err_user_disabled: This user account has been disabled. Please contact support.
auth.err_network: Network error occurred. Please check your internet connection.
auth.err_google: An error occurred during Google sign-in.
auth.subtitle_login: Please log in to your account
auth.signup_complete_desc: Your account has been created successfully. Please try logging in with your new credentials.
auth.err_enter_email_for_reset: Please enter your email address to receive a password reset link.
auth.pwd_reset_sent: A password reset link has been sent to your email address.
auth.pwd_reset_subtitle: We will send a password reset link to your email address.
auth.import_guest_data_desc: We detected tasks and categories from your guest session. Would you like to import them into your new account?
auth.import_success: Import successful! Your data is now safely synced with your account.
auth.err_invalid_email_tooltip: Please include an '@' in the email address. The address is missing an '@'.
auth.verification_sent: A verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.verification_success: Email verification completed! Your account is secured.
auth.verification_pending: Verification is not completed yet. Please click the link in your email and try again.
auth.verification_banner_text: Please verify your email address to secure your account.
